name: Human Rights Law Network (HRLN)
description: A collective of lawyers and social activists dedicated to providing legal support to the marginalized, protecting human rights, and running public interest litigation (PIL) campaigns.

name: Majlis Legal Centre
description: Provides legal aid, advocacy, and counseling services to women and children facing domestic violence and societal discrimination. Champions gender-just laws.

name: Bachpan Bachao Andolan (BBA)
description: Founded by Nobel Laureate Kailash Satyarthi, BBA is India's premier organization campaigning for child rights, rescuing child laborers, and ensuring juvenile justice.

name: Common Cause
description: An organization dedicated to championing public causes, democratic reforms, rule of law, and institutional accountability through high-impact Public Interest Litigations (PILs).

name: Alternative Law Forum (ALF)
description: ALF integrates high-quality legal research, advocacy, and direct pro-bono legal counsel to working-class, LGBTQIA+, and minority communities.
